title: Create Railways
description: Build beautiful trains with Create & add-ons!
body: Create Railways is a modpack based on Create mod, mainly focused on building trains. Features include: - Create mod & Create Steam 'n Rails - Various add-ons - Easy LAN-sharing support - Performance optimisations - Immersive world generation & structures _If you've built something amazing, feel free to [email me](mailto:9b866d40-deeb-430e-8f82-fa0dd772b5a7@simplelogin.com) and I'll add it to the project's gallery._
